---
title: "appendix"
author: "Sinping CHAN"
format: html
editor: visual
---

### R code for data cleaning

![](images/cleaning_code1.png)

![](images/cleaning_code2.png)

![](images/cleaning_code3.png)

### Correct my tone and writing in Dataset Introduction section

![](images/螢幕擷取畫面 2026-03-31 213122.png)

![](images/2026-03-31 212946-01.png)

![](images/2026-03-31 212958.png)
